public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as petition reader.
manner: Reads as a functional local operator shaped by place, duty, and the practical customs around them. In Soreheim Alliance, that reads as someone quota-aware, contribution-minded, and structurally pragmatic, filtering choices through communal ambition, and the habits of a petition reader still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of petition reader in and around Artificers’ Guild, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Artificers’ Guild workable through the obligations of petition reader while managing the immediate pressure of resource depletion in Soreheim Alliance.
hidden_pressure: Must keep their piece of the world working while larger systems push stress downward. Around Artificers’ Guild, that usually means carrying resource depletion, sabotage, predatory frontier ecology without letting the role of petition reader visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Vorga Coalward can offer grounded local knowledge once the party proves it is useful rather than merely curious.
Vorga Coalward needs help with a problem in Artificers’ Guild that larger systems have pushed down onto ordinary hands.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained.
public_signal: Vorga Coalward carries the look of a practiced local operator whose authority is read through place, familiarity, and the reactions of others more than formal insignia.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Artificers’ Guild: the part of Artificers’ Guild where their work actually matters day to day
who_avoids_them: those who only appear when things break
